title: New Strong Sell Stocks for December 28th
text: ALTO, BANC and CBRE have been added to the Zacks Rank #5 (Strong Sell) List on December 28, 2023.

title: MainStay CBRE Global Infrastructure Megatrends Term Fund (NYSE: MEGI) Declares Monthly Distribution for December 2023 and Availability of 19(a) Notice
text: NEW YORK , Dec. 14, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- MainStay CBRE Global Infrastructure Megatrends Term Fund (the "Fund") (NYSE: MEGI) today announced the Fund's monthly distributions for December 2023 of $0.1250 per common share. The Fund's current annualized distribution rate is 11.80% based upon the closing price of $12.71 on December 12, 2023, and 10.07% based upon the Fund's closing NAV of $14.90 as of the same date.

title: Let's Look Back on 3 Commercial Real Estate Trends That Emerged in 2023
text: Real estate investments are highly sensitive to changes in interest rates. Since 2022, the Federal Reserve has aggressively raised interest rates, creating challenges for commercial real estate companies.
